class.name: OpenXRSpatialEntitiesUnified
class.brief_description: An API to simplify code that requires spatial context(s) to be created with multiple spatial capabilities.
class.description:
The original motivation for this class was to create a single spatial context with multiple capabilities since otherwise some extensions would not work. In addition to unifying multiple spatial capabilities, it also provides more granular control over spatial capabilities. For example, maybe an app wants to discover anchors and planes, but for planes they just want to be able to toggle meshing and automatic updates. [codeblock] func _ready(): var flags := OpenXRSpatialEntitiesUnified.CAPABILITY_FLAGS_PLANE_TRACKING | OpenXRSpatialEntitiesUnified.CAPABILITY_FLAGS_ANCHOR_TRACKING var options := { OpenXRSpatialEntitiesUnified.CAPABILITY_OPTIONS_ENABLE_PLANE_MESH_2D : false, OpenXRSpatialEntitiesUnified.CAPABILITY_OPTIONS_ENABLE_PLANE_POLYGON_2D : false, } OpenXRSpatialEntitiesUnified.create_unified_spatial_context(flags, _on_created, OpenXRSpatialEntitiesUnified.CAPABILITY_FLAGS_ANCHOR_TRACKING, options)
func _on_created(unified_spatial_context: RID): _unified_spatial_context = unified_spatial_context
# maybe this app eventually wants to turn meshing back on func _turn_meshing_on(): var flags = OpenXRSpatialEntitiesUnified.CAPABILITY_FLAGS_PLANE var options = OpenXRSpatialEntitiesUnified.CAPABILITY_OPTIONS_ENABLE_PLANE_MESH_2D OpenXRSpatialEntitiesUnified.enable_discovery_capability_option(_unified_spatial_context, flags, options, true)
# maybe this app wants to toggle automatic update for planes sometime after initialization func _enable_automatic_discovery_for_planes(enable: bool): var discovery_query := true OpenXRSpatialEntitiesUnified.set_automatic_update(_unified_spatial_context, OpenXRSpatialEntitiesUnified.CAPABILITY_FLAGS_PLANE_TRACKING, enable, discovery_query) [/codeblock]

method.name: create_unified_spatial_context
method.description: Creates a spatial context with the capabilities specified in [param capability_flags]. [param callback] is called when the context is created, with the first parameter being the spatial context [RID]. [param capability_options] is a [Dictionary], where each key is [enum CapabilityOptions] and the value depends on the option. See [enum CapabilityOptions]. Any capabilities set in [param enable_automatic_discovery_query] and [param enable_automatic_update_query] will automatically be updated after the context is created, assuming those capabilities are available by the XR runtime. [b]NOTE:[/b] this does not return [OpenXRFutureResult] because sometimes it has async operations that must complete before the context is created. A valid [param callback] must be provide for this function to be useful.

method.name: destroy_unified_spatial_context
method.description: Destroy the spatial context created by [method create_unified_spatial_context]. [b]NOTE:[/b] Even though the spatial context can also be destroyed by [method OpenXRSpatialEntityExtension.free_spatial_context], be sure to call this method to ensure proper cleanup.

method.name: enable_discovery_capability_option
method.description: Enable or disable a [param capability_option] for the chosen [param capability_flags], for discovery queries.

method.name: enable_update_capability_option
method.description: Enable or disable a [param capability_option] for the chosen [param capability_flags], for update queries.

method.name: get_automatic_update
method.description: Get which capabilities, indicated with [enum CapabilityFlags], are automatically updated. Set [param discovery] to [code]true[/code] to get the capabilities that are automatically queried for discovery. Set [param discovery] to [code]false[/code] to get the capabilities that are automatically queried for update.

method.name: get_capability_flags
method.description: Get the [enum OpenXRSpatialEntitiesUnified.CapabilityFlags] flags that the [param unified_spatial_context] uses. Note that these flags are either equal, or a subset, of the flags passed in [method create_unified_spatial_context] due to availability of extensions at runtime.

method.name: get_capability_options
method.description: Returns an [Array] with two [Dictionary]s. Index 0 is a [Dictionary] containing capability options for discovery, where the [Dictionary] maps [enum CapabilityFlags] to a [Dictionary], which maps [enum CapabilityOptions] to a [code]boolean[/code] indicating if it's enabled or not. Index 1 is a [Dictionary] containing capability options for update, where the [Dictionary] maps [enum CapabilityFlags] to a [Dictionary], which maps [enum CapabilityOptions] to a [code]boolean[/code] indicating if it's enabled or not. This method can help understand the relationship between each [enum CapabilityFlags] and their available [enum CapabilityOptions] used in discovery and update queries.

method.name: get_persistence_context
method.description: Retrieve the persistence context used when creating [param unified_spatial_context], or [code]null[/code] if a persistence context was not created.

method.name: is_automatic_update
method.description: Determine if all of the [param capability_flags] are automatically updated for the given [param unified_spatial_context]. [code]false[/code] is returned if at least 1 capability is not automatically updated or for an invalid [param unified_spatial_context]. Set [param discovery] to [code]true[/code] to check discovery capabilities. Set [param discovery] to [code]false[/code] to check update capabilities.

method.name: is_capability_supported
method.description:
Check if the given [param capability_flags] are enabled for [param unified_spatial_context]. All of the flags must be present to return [code]true[/code]. This method is provided for convenience; it turns this [codeblock] var flags := OpenXRSpatialEntitiesUnified.CAPABILITY_FLAGS_ANCHOR | OpenXRSpatialEntitiesUnified.CAPABILITY_FLAGS_PLANE if flags == (OpenXRSpatialEntitiesUnified.get_capability_flags(context) & flags): # do something
[/codeblock] Into [codeblock] if OpenXRSpatialEntitiesUnified.is_capability_supported(context, OpenXRSpatialEntitiesUnified.CAPABILITY_FLAGS_ANCHOR | OpenXRSpatialEntitiesUnified.CAPABILITY_FLAGS_PLANE): # do something [/codeblock]

method.name: set_automatic_update
method.description: Enables or disables automatic updates for the [param unified_spatial_context] for the given [param capability_flags]. Unsupported [enum CapabilityFlags] are ignored, which means setting [param capability_flags] to [constant CAPABILITY_FLAGS_ALL] is standard way to turn on updates for all capabilities, and [constant CAPABILITY_FLAGS_NONE] to turn off all updates. The returned [enum CapabilityFlags] are identical to [method get_capability_flags]. Set [param discovery] to [code]true[/code] to set automatic updates for discovery query. Set [param discovery] to [code]false[/code] to set automatic updates for update query.

constants.constant: This is a value to check for the absence of flags, for example: [codeblock] if my_capability_flags == CAPABILITY_FLAGS_NONE: # there are no flags set [/codeblock]
Enable [OpenXRSpatialAnchorCapability].
Include [OpenXRSpatialContextPersistenceConfig] with [OpenXRSpatialAnchorCapability]. Ignored if [constant CAPABILITY_FLAGS_ANCHOR] is missing.
The combination of all [code]CAPABILITY_FLAGS_ANCHOR_*[/code] flags.
Enable [OpenXRSpatialPlaneTrackingCapability].
The combination of all [code]CAPABILITY_FLAGS_PLANE_*[/code] flags.
Include [OpenXRSpatialCapabilityConfigurationQrCode] with [OpenXRSpatialMarkerTrackingCapability].
Include [OpenXRSpatialCapabilityConfigurationMicroQrCode] with [OpenXRSpatialMarkerTrackingCapability].
Include [OpenXRSpatialCapabilityConfigurationAruco] with [OpenXRSpatialMarkerTrackingCapability].
Include [OpenXRSpatialCapabilityConfigurationAprilTag] with [OpenXRSpatialMarkerTrackingCapability].
The combination of all [code]CAPABILITY_FLAGS_MARKER_*[/code] flags.
All of the [enum CapabilityFlags].

An optional [enum OpenXRSpatialAnchorCapability.PersistenceScope] to use when creating the persistence context. If unspecified, the persistence context is created with [method OpenXRSpatialAnchorCapability.create_default_persistence_context] which uses a default [enum OpenXRSpatialAnchorCapability.PersistenceScope].

When creating the spatial context with [OpenXRSpatialCapabilityConfigurationAruco], set the aruco dict with this [enum OpenXRSpatialCapabilityConfigurationAruco.ArucoDict] If unspecified, [method OpenXRSpatialCapabilityConfigurationAruco.set_default_aruco_dict] is used.

When creating the spatial context with [OpenXRSpatialCapabilityConfigurationAprilTag], set the april dict with this [enum OpenXRSpatialCapabilityConfigurationAprilTag.AprilTagDict]. If unspecified, [method OpenXRSpatialCapabilityConfigurationAprilTag.set_default_april_dict] is used.

Used in discovery query in addition to [constant CAPABILITY_OPTIONS_ENABLE_ANCHOR_PERSISTENCE]. Used in update query for updating anchors. See also [OpenXRSpatialAnchorCapability] and [OpenXRSpatialComponentAnchorList].
Used in discovery query for finding previously persisted anchors. See also [OpenXRSpatialAnchorCapability] and [OpenXRSpatialComponentPersistenceList].
Used in discovery query for finding planes transform and extents. See also [OpenXRSpatialPlaneTrackingCapability] and [OpenXRSpatialComponentBounded2DList].
Used in discovery query for finding planes alignment. See also [OpenXRSpatialPlaneTrackingCapability] and [OpenXRSpatialComponentPlaneAlignmentList].
Used in discovery query for finding planes 2D mesh. See also [OpenXRSpatialPlaneTrackingCapability] and [OpenXRSpatialComponentMesh2DList].
Used in discovery query for finding planes 2D polygon. See also [OpenXRSpatialPlaneTrackingCapability] and [OpenXRSpatialComponentPolygon2DList].
Used in discovery query for finding planes semantic label. See also [OpenXRSpatialPlaneTrackingCapability] and [OpenXRSpatialComponentPlaneSemanticLabelList].

Used in discovery query for finding QRCode markers. Used in update query for updating QRCode markers. See also [OpenXRSpatialMarkerTrackingCapability] and [OpenXRSpatialCapabilityConfigurationQrCode].

Used in discovery query for finding Micro QRCode markers. Used in update query for updating Micro QRCode markers. See also [OpenXRSpatialMarkerTrackingCapability] and [OpenXRSpatialCapabilityConfigurationMicroQrCode].
Used in discovery query for finding Aruco markers. Used in update query for updating Aruco markers. See also [OpenXRSpatialMarkerTrackingCapability] and [OpenXRSpatialCapabilityConfigurationAruco].

Used in discovery query for finding April markers. Used in update query for updating April markers. See also [OpenXRSpatialMarkerTrackingCapability] and [OpenXRSpatialCapabilityConfigurationAprilTag].
